general_hypothesis: A public procedural guide may change artifact quality on non-ceiling tasks, and the observed contrast may differ under a guide-independent versus guide-shared instrument.

difficulty_changes.change: Split evidence across measurement and ablation files and add a polished selective summary explicitly labeled non-authoritative.
difficulty_changes.basis: Disclosed contradiction-distance and distractor-quality knobs in pilots/lh-skill-adoption/README.md lines 135-146.

difficulty_changes.change: Require greatest-sequence supersession and an explicit state-transition artifact over overlapping applicable records.
difficulty_changes.basis: Publicly disclosed authority/valid-time/state-delta consequences, extending the existing persistent-workspace structure without hidden obligations.

fairness_rule: Every scored consequence appears in each cluster's public task. Private rubrics may operationalize only those consequences and must admit documented semantically valid alternatives.
expert_status: No task, guide, rubric, threshold, or source variant in this directory is expert-approved.
